zh.Orcharton, Modbury, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文莫德波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Reginald de Prideaux於大約1266年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Roger de Prideaux I43歲，母親Gilda de Banco48歲。他於大約1249年與Claricia Pedes在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1316年享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文莫德波利。

zh-hans.Orcharton, Modbury, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文莫德波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter Reginald de Prideaux于大约1266年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Roger de Prideaux I43岁，母亲Gilda de Banco48岁。他于大约1249年与Claricia Pedes在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1316年享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文莫德波利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Prideaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish (Cornwall and Devon): habitational name from a place in the parish of Luxulyan, or perhaps the placename derives from the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Reginald de Prideaux was born about 1266, in Devon, England, his father, Roger de Prideaux I, was 43 and his mother, Gilda de Banco, was 48. He married Claricia Pedes about 1249, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1316, at the age of 51, and was buried in Modbury, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter Reginald de Prideaux est né environ 1266, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Prideaux I, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Gilda de Banco, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Claricia Pedes environ 1249, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1316, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Modbury, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter Reginald de Prideaux um 1266 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Prideaux I 43 und seine Mutter Gilda de Banco 48. Er hat um 1249 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Claricia Pedes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1316 im Alter von 51 Jahren und wurde in Modbury, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Reginald de Prideaux è nato il circa 1266 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Roger de Prideaux I, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Gilda de Banco, aveva 48 anni. Lui sposato Claricia Pedes circa 1249, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1316, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Modbury, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter Reginald de Prideauxが約1266年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Roger de Prideaux Iは43歳，母Gilda de Bancoは48歳であった。約1249年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでClaricia Pedesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1316年に51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンモドブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter Reginald de Prideaux(이)가 대략 1266년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Prideaux I(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Gilda de Banco(은)는 48세였다. 그는 대략 1249년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Claricia Pedes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1316년 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 모드버이에 묻혔다.

mn.Orcharton, Modbury, Devon, England: Modbury, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Reginald de Prideaux nasceu aproximadamente 1266, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Prideaux I, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Gilda de Banco, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Claricia Pedes aproximadamente 1249, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1316, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Modbury, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Reginald de Prideaux родился около 1266 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Prideaux I было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Gilda de Banco, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Claricia Pedes около 1249 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1316 г. в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности модбури, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter Reginald de Prideaux nació aproximadamente 1266, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Prideaux I, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Gilda de Banco, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Claricia Pedes aproximadamente 1249, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1316, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Modbury, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
